modules.module_title: Introduction to Solid Waste Management & Waste Classification
Health, Safety, Environmental Impact & Community Participation in SWM

questions.question: Solid Waste Management (SWM) ka primary goal kya hai?

options.A: Waste ko bas ek jagah ikattha karna
options.B: Environment aur public health ko waste ke negative effects se bachana
options.C: Sirf paper waste ko recycle karna

questions.explanation: SWM ka mukhya uddeshya environment aur public health ko waste ke harmful impacts se protect karna hai, jisme collection, transport, treatment aur disposal sab shamil hai.

questions.question: Household se nikalne wale waste ko commonly kya kehte hain?

options.B: Municipal Solid Waste (MSW)

questions.explanation: Gharon se nikalne wala waste, jaise kitchen waste, paper, plastic, etc., Municipal Solid Waste (MSW) kehlata hai.

questions.question: Kon sa waste type 'biodegradable' category mein aata hai?

options.B: Glass jars

questions.explanation: Biodegradable waste woh hota hai jo natural processes se decompose ho sakta hai. Vegetable peels iska ek perfect example hain.

questions.question: E-waste mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Old electronics like phones, computers, TVs

questions.explanation: E-waste ya electronic waste mein discarded electronic devices jaise phones, computers, aur TVs shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Waste hierarchy ka pehla aur sabse preferred step kya hai?

options.B: Recycling

questions.explanation: Waste hierarchy mein sabse upar aur preferred step waste ko generate hone se rokna ya kam karna (Prevention/Reduction) hai.

questions.question: Hospitals aur clinics se nikalne wala waste kis category mein aata hai?

options.B: Industrial Waste

questions.explanation: Hospitals aur clinics se nikalne wala waste, jismein infected materials aur sharps shamil hote hain, Biomedical Waste kehlata hai.

questions.question: Construction aur Demolition (C&D) waste ke main components kya hote hain?

options.B: Brick, concrete, wood, metal

questions.explanation: Construction aur Demolition (C&D) waste mein mukhyatah building materials jaise brick, concrete, wood, aur metal shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Ek SWM worker ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Waste ko efficiently collect, sort aur process karna

questions.explanation: Ek SWM worker ka mukhya kaam waste ko sahi tareeke se collect karna, sort karna aur aage processing ke liye taiyar karna hota hai.

questions.question: Kon sa waste type 'non-biodegradable' hai?

options.B: Paper

questions.explanation: Non-biodegradable waste woh hota hai jo natural processes se decompose nahi hota, jaise plastic wrappers.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko handle karte samay sabse important precaution kya hai?

options.A: Usse normal waste ke saath mix karna
options.B: Proper PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ko handle karte samay apni safety ke liye proper Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Source segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Waste ko landfill mein mix karna
options.B: Waste ko uske source par hi alag-alag karna
options.C: Waste ko ek jagah se dusri jagah le jana

questions.explanation: Source segregation ka matlab hai waste ko uske utpatti sthal (source) par hi different categories (jaise wet, dry) mein alag karna.

questions.question: Waste characterization ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Waste ko aur zyada mixed karna
options.B: Waste management strategies ko better plan karna

questions.explanation: Waste characterization (waste ki composition aur quantity pata karna) waste management strategies ko sahi tareeke se plan karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Greenhouse gas emissions mein landfill ka kya role hai?

options.A: Landfill se koi gas nahi nikalti
options.B: Landfill se sirf oxygen nikalti hai
options.C: Organic waste ke decompose hone se methane gas nikalti hai, jo ek powerful greenhouse gas hai
options.D: Landfill sirf carbon dioxide release karta hai

questions.explanation: Landfills mein organic waste ke anaerobic decomposition se methane (CH4) gas release hoti hai, jo carbon dioxide se bhi zyada powerful greenhouse gas hai.

questions.question: Illegal dumping ke kya consequences ho sakte hain?

options.B: Soil aur water pollution

questions.explanation: Illegal dumping se environment ko bahut nuksan hota hai, jaise soil aur water pollution, diseases ka phailna, aur badbu.

questions.question: Kon sa factor waste generation ko increase karta hai?

options.B: Higher population density aur economic growth

questions.explanation: Population density aur economic growth jaise factors consumption patterns ko badhate hain, jisse overall waste generation bhi increase hota hai.

questions.question: Integrated Solid Waste Management (ISWM) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi waste management method ka use karna
options.B: Waste management ke liye multiple techniques aur strategies ka combination use karna

questions.explanation: ISWM ek comprehensive approach hai jisme waste management ke liye collection, recycling, composting, landfilling, energy recovery jaise multiple methods ko combine kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Waste audit karne ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Waste stream ki composition aur quantity ko understand karna
options.C: Waste collection vehicles ko repair karna
options.D: Waste ko ek jagah se dusri jagah transfer karna

questions.explanation: Waste audit waste stream mein kis type ka waste kitni quantity mein hai, yeh pata lagane ke liye kiya jata hai, jisse effective management plans banaye ja sakein.

questions.question: Door-to-door waste collection ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Public bins ki zaroorat badhti hai
options.B: Streets par waste accumulation kam hota hai
options.C: Waste sorting mushkil ho jata hai
options.D: Collection cost bahut badh jati hai

questions.explanation: Door-to-door collection se waste sidha gharon se uthaya jata hai, jisse public bins mein waste overflow nahi hota aur streets saaf rehti hain.

questions.question: Waste collection ke liye commonly use hone wale vehicle ka naam kya hai?

options.B: Garbage truck (Compactor)

questions.explanation: Garbage trucks, specially compactors, waste collection aur transport ke liye widely use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Primary waste collection ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Waste ko landfill tak le jana
options.B: Waste ko uske source (ghar, shop) se collect karna

questions.explanation: Primary collection mein waste ko uske generation point se collect karke ek temporary storage ya transfer point tak laya jata hai.

questions.question: Waste collection route planning ka kya objective hai?

options.B: Fuel consumption aur time ko minimize karna
options.C: Zyada se zyada traffic areas se guzarna
options.D: Har din alag route use karna

questions.explanation: Route planning ka uddeshya collection efficiency badhana, fuel aur time cost kam karna hota hai.

questions.question: Transfer station ka kya role hai waste management mein?

options.A: Waste ko final disposal ke liye treat karna
options.B: Waste ko chhote collection vehicles se bade transport vehicles mein transfer karna

questions.explanation: Transfer stations chhote collection vehicles se waste ko bade transport vehicles mein shift karne ke liye use hote hain, jo ise final disposal ya treatment site tak le jaate hain.

questions.question: Waste collection ke dauran workers ko kya PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Safety gloves, masks, reflective vests

questions.explanation: Safety gloves, masks, aur reflective vests jaise PPE workers ko injuries aur infections se bachate hain.

questions.question: Waste bin ka color code 'Green' generally kis type ke waste ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Wet/Organic waste

questions.explanation: Commonly, green bins biodegradable ya wet waste ke liye use hote hain, jo composting ke liye suitable hota hai.

questions.question: Compactor truck ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Waste ko compress karke zyada volume transport karta hai

questions.explanation: Compactor trucks waste ko compress karke uski density badhate hain, jisse ek hi trip mein zyada waste transport kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Secondary waste collection ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Community bins ya transfer stations se waste collect karna aur final site tak le jana

questions.explanation: Secondary collection mein waste ko primary collection points (jaise community bins) se uthakar treatment, disposal ya transfer site tak le jaya jata hai.

questions.question: Waste collection vehicles ki regular maintenance kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf vehicle ko naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: Breakdowns kam karne, efficiency badhane aur operational cost kam karne ke liye
options.D: Noise pollution increase karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se vehicle ki life badhti hai, breakdowns kam hote hain, aur collection process smooth aur cost-effective rehta hai.

questions.question: Waste collection mein 'bell ringing' system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Logon ko waste generate karne ke liye encourage karta hai
options.B: Residents ko waste collection vehicle ke aane ki soochana deta hai
options.D: Waste ko recycle karne mein help karta hai

questions.explanation: Bell ringing system residents ko alert karta hai ki collection vehicle aa gaya hai, jisse woh apna waste timely de sakte hain.

questions.question: Waste collection mein GPS tracking ka kya use hai?

options.B: Vehicles ki real-time location track karna aur routes optimize karna

questions.explanation: GPS tracking se collection vehicles ki movement monitor hoti hai, jisse routes ko optimize kiya ja sakta hai aur efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Open dumping sites par waste collection workers ko kis type ke risks ho sakte hain?

options.B: Infections, injuries, toxic gas exposure

questions.explanation: Open dumping sites par workers ko sharp objects, hazardous chemicals, infectious agents aur toxic gases se health risks hote hain.

questions.question: Waste collection bags ke liye kaun sa material preferable hai?

options.B: Durable, leak-proof bags

questions.explanation: Waste collection ke liye durable aur leak-proof bags use karne chahiye, taaki waste spill na ho aur workers safe rahen.

questions.question: Waste collection frequency kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Waste generation rate, storage capacity aur public health concerns par

questions.explanation: Collection frequency waste kitna generate ho raha hai, usko store karne ki kitni jagah hai, aur hygiene requirements par depend karti hai.

questions.question: Waste collection system mein 'containment' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Waste ko environment mein release hone se rokne aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Waste ko recycle karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper containment (bins, bags) waste ko failne se rokta hai, badbu control karta hai aur public health ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Waste collection efficiency ko kaise improve kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Proper route planning, vehicle maintenance aur worker training se

questions.explanation: Efficient collection ke liye scientific route planning, vehicles ka regular maintenance aur trained workforce ka hona bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waste segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi waste ko ek saath mix karna
options.B: Waste ko uski properties ke according alag-alag karna
options.C: Waste ko seedha landfill mein dalna

questions.explanation: Segregation ka matlab hai waste ko uske type (biodegradable, non-biodegradable, hazardous) ke hisab se alag karna.

questions.question: Wet waste mein generally kya aata hai?

options.B: Glass pieces

questions.explanation: Wet waste mein kitchen waste jaise food scraps, vegetable/fruit peels aur garden waste shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Dry waste mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Diapers

questions.explanation: Dry waste non-biodegradable hota hai aur isme paper, plastic, glass, metals jaise recyclable materials shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Waste segregation kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf waste ka volume badhane ke liye
options.B: Recycling aur composting ko efficient banane ke liye
options.C: Waste ko aur zyada contaminate karne ke liye
options.D: Waste disposal cost badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper segregation se recyclable aur compostable waste ko alag kiya ja sakta hai, jisse unki processing easy ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Material Recovery Facility (MRF) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Mixed waste se recyclable materials ko sort aur process karna

questions.explanation: MRF woh facility hoti hai jahan mixed dry waste se valuable recyclable items ko mechanical ya manual processes se recover kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Baling machine ka kya use hai waste management mein?

options.B: Waste ko compact karke bales banana for easier transport

questions.explanation: Baling machine waste materials (jaise paper, plastic) ko compress karke tight bundles (bales) banati hai, jisse unhe store aur transport karna easy ho jata hai.

questions.question: Shredding machine ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waste ko chhote-chhote pieces mein cut karna

questions.explanation: Shredding machine waste materials ko chhote pieces mein cut karti hai, jisse unka volume kam hota hai aur aage ki processing easy ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Manual sorting ke dauran waste pickers ko kin risks ka saamna karna padta hai?

options.B: Cuts, infections, respiratory problems

questions.explanation: Manual sorting mein waste pickers ko sharp objects se cuts, infectious waste se diseases aur dust/gases se respiratory issues ka risk hota hai.

questions.question: Kon sa waste processing technique waste ka volume significantly reduce karta hai?

options.B: Compaction

questions.explanation: Compaction waste ko compress karke uska volume bahut kam kar deta hai, jisse storage aur transport efficient ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Segregation at source ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Recyclable materials ki quality kam hoti hai
options.B: Waste treatment aur disposal cost kam hoti hai
options.C: Landfill mein zyada waste jata hai
options.D: Waste collection mushkil ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Jab waste source par hi alag ho jata hai, toh uski contamination kam hoti hai, jisse recycling aur composting easy aur cost-effective ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Magnetic separator kis type ke waste ko alag karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Plastic

questions.explanation: Magnetic separators ferrous metals ko mixed waste stream se alag karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Trommel screen ka kya function hai waste processing mein?

options.B: Waste ko size ke according separate karna

questions.explanation: Trommel screen ek rotating cylindrical screen hota hai jo waste ko uske particle size ke hisab se separate karta hai, jaise fine organic matter ko bade non-recyclables se alag karna.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko kaise process karna chahiye?

options.A: Normal waste ke saath mix karke
options.B: Specialized treatment facilities mein separate aur safe tareeke se

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ko special care aur specialized facilities mein hi treat aur dispose kiya jana chahiye taaki environment aur public health ko koi nuksan na ho.

questions.question: Waste processing mein 'densification' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Waste ki density badhana (e.g., compaction, baling)
options.C: Waste ko liquid form mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Densification mein waste ko compress karke uski density badhai jaati hai, jisse storage aur transport space kam lagti hai.

questions.question: Waste sorting ke liye NIR (Near-Infrared) technology ka kya use hai?

options.B: Plastic types ko automatically identify aur separate karna

questions.explanation: NIR technology advanced sorting facilities mein use hoti hai jahan different plastic polymers ko unki spectral properties ke basis par automatically identify aur separate kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek efficient Material Recovery Facility (MRF) ke liye sabse important factor kya hai?

options.A: Mixed waste ka high contamination level
options.B: Properly segregated waste input

questions.explanation: MRF ki efficiency aur recovered materials ki quality directly is baat par depend karti hai ki usme kitna clean aur properly segregated waste input ho raha hai.

questions.question: Waste processing mein 'Eddy Current Separator' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Non-ferrous metals (aluminium, copper) ko alag karna

questions.explanation: Eddy Current Separator non-ferrous metals jaise aluminium aur copper ko mixed waste stream se separate karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Scientific landfill ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Waste ko bas open mein dalna
options.B: Waste ko engineer kiye gaye site par safely dispose karna, jisme liner aur leachate collection system ho

questions.explanation: Scientific landfill ek engineered facility hoti hai jahan waste ko safely dispose kiya jata hai, jismein soil aur synthetic liners, leachate collection aur gas recovery systems hote hain.

questions.question: Leachate kya hai?

options.B: Waste se filter hokar zameen mein jane wala liquid

questions.explanation: Leachate woh liquid hota hai jo waste se filter hokar neeche ki taraf jaata hai, aur isme harmful contaminants ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Composting kis type ke waste ke liye suitable hai?

options.B: Hazardous waste

questions.explanation: Composting ek natural process hai jismein organic waste ko microbes ki help se decompose karke nutrient-rich soil amendment banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Incineration ka kya fayda hai waste treatment mein?

options.B: Waste ka volume bahut kam karta hai aur energy generate karta hai

questions.explanation: Incineration mein waste ko high temperatures par jalaya jata hai, jisse uska volume drastically kam hota hai aur is process se energy bhi generate ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Refuse Derived Fuel (RDF) kya hai?

options.A: Directly food waste se bani fuel
options.B: Non-recyclable dry waste ko process karke banayi gayi fuel

questions.explanation: RDF non-recyclable dry waste materials (jaise plastic, paper, textiles) ko process karke banaya jata hai aur isse energy recover ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Vermicomposting mein kaun se organism use hote hain?

options.B: Fungi

questions.explanation: Vermicomposting mein earthworms (kenchue) organic waste ko decompose karke high-quality compost banate hain.

questions.question: Biomethanation process ka kya output hai?

options.B: Biogas (methane) aur bio-manure

questions.explanation: Biomethanation ek anaerobic decomposition process hai jismein organic waste se biogas (jismein methane predominant hota hai) aur nutrient-rich bio-manure produce hota hai.

questions.question: Landfill gas collection system kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf landfill ko garam rakhne ke liye
options.B: Methane jaise greenhouse gases ko capture karke energy generate karne ke liye
options.C: Leachate ko control karne ke liye
options.D: Waste ko compact karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Landfill gas collection system methane ko capture karta hai, jisse air pollution kam hota hai aur is gas ko energy production ke liye bhi use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Composting ke liye ideal Carbon-to-Nitrogen (C:N) ratio kya hai?
questions.explanation: Successful composting ke liye ideal C:N ratio 25:1 se 30:1 ke beech hota hai, jo microbial activity ko support karta hai.

questions.question: Incineration se nikalne wali ash ko kaise manage karna chahiye?

options.A: Normal waste ke saath mix karke
options.B: Specialized hazardous waste landfill mein dispose karke, agar usme heavy metals hon

questions.explanation: Incineration ash mein heavy metals aur toxins ho sakte hain, isliye usse properly test karke, agar hazardous ho toh, special landfills mein hi dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: Pyrolysis aur Gasification mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Pyrolysis oxygen ki absence mein hota hai, jabki gasification controlled oxygen supply mein
options.C: Pyrolysis mein waste jalaya jata hai, gasification mein nahi
options.D: Pyrolysis sirf liquid fuel banata hai

questions.explanation: Pyrolysis anaerobic (no oxygen) heating hai jo liquid/gas/char banati hai, jabki gasification limited oxygen mein partial combustion hai jo syngas banati hai.

questions.question: Sanitary landfill mein daily cover ka kya role hai?

options.A: Waste ko aur zyada expose karna
options.B: Badbu, pests ko control karna aur aag lagne ka risk kam karna

questions.explanation: Daily cover (mitti ya alternate material) waste ko cover karta hai, jisse badbu, pests control hote hain aur aag lagne ka khatra kam hota hai.

questions.question: Aerobic composting ke liye kya conditions zaroori hain?

options.B: Adequate moisture aur oxygen supply
options.D: Compost pile ko disturb na karna

questions.explanation: Aerobic composting mein microbes ko oxygen ki zaroorat hoti hai. Iske liye compost pile ko regularly turn karna aur moisture maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waste-to-Energy (WtE) plants ka kya main benefit hai?

options.B: Waste ko dispose karne ke saath-saath energy (electricity/heat) generate karna

questions.explanation: WtE plants waste ko jalakar ya gasification jaise process se energy produce karte hain, jisse landfill space kam hoti hai aur renewable energy milti hai.

questions.question: Leachate treatment plant mein kaun se steps shamil ho sakte hain?

options.B: Physical, chemical aur biological processes se leachate ko purify karna
options.C: Leachate ko directly river mein discharge karna

questions.explanation: Leachate treatment plants mein filtration, chemical precipitation, biological degradation jaise kai steps hote hain, jisse leachate ko safe level tak treat kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Anaerobic digester ka kya fayda hai over aerobic composting?

options.A: Zyada oxygen ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.B: Biogas production aur enclosed system ke karan odor control better hota hai
options.D: Sirf dry waste ke liye suitable hai

questions.explanation: Anaerobic digesters oxygen ki absence mein kaam karte hain, jisse biogas produce hota hai aur enclosed system hone ke karan badbu ka control zyada effective hota hai.

questions.question: Integrated Waste Management Facility (IWMF) ka kya concept hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi method se waste handle karna
options.B: Ek hi location par multiple waste treatment aur disposal methods ko integrate karna

questions.explanation: IWMF ek aisa complex hai jahan waste collection, sorting, composting, recycling, WtE aur landfilling jaise kai processes ek hi jagah par integrate kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: 3R's ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle

questions.explanation: 3R's waste management hierarchy ke fundamental principles hain: Reduce (kam karna), Reuse (dobara istemal karna), aur Recycle (punarchakra karna).

questions.question: Waste 'Reduction' ka sabse achha example kya hai?

options.B: Plastic bags ki jagah reusable cloth bags use karna
options.D: Zyada se zyada packaged goods kharidna

questions.explanation: Reusable cloth bags use karna waste generation ko kam karta hai, jo reduction ka ek direct example hai.

questions.question: 'Reuse' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Item ko uske original form mein dobara istemal karna

questions.explanation: Reuse ka matlab hai kisi item ko uske original ya slightly modified form mein dobara use karna, jaise glass jars ko storage ke liye use karna.

questions.question: Kon sa item 'recyclable' hai?

options.B: Broken ceramic plates

questions.explanation: Aluminium cans ko melt karke naye aluminium products banaye ja sakte hain, isliye yeh recyclable hain.

questions.question: Recycling ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Landfill space kam hoti hai aur naye products banane ke liye energy save hoti hai

questions.explanation: Recycling se landfill mein jane wale waste ki quantity kam hoti hai aur naye products banane ke liye raw materials aur energy ki bachat hoti hai.

questions.question: Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Consumers waste ko manage karne ke liye responsible hain
options.B: Producers apne products ke end-of-life management ke liye responsible hain
options.C: Government hi sab waste manage karti hai
options.D: Waste pickers hi recycling ke liye responsible hain

questions.explanation: EPR ek policy approach hai jahan producers ko apne products ki life cycle ke end mein environmental impact ko manage karne ki zimmedari di jaati hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling ke liye sabse common challenge kya hai?

options.B: Different types of plastics ko sort karna mushkil hona

questions.explanation: Plastics kai types ke hote hain (PET, HDPE, PVC, LDPE, PP, PS, etc.) aur inko alag-alag sort karna recycling process ke liye ek major challenge hai.

questions.question: Solid Waste Management Rules 2016 (India) ke according, source segregation kitne streams mein mandatory hai?

options.B: Do streams (wet aur dry)
options.C: Teen streams (wet, dry aur domestic hazardous)

questions.explanation: SWM Rules 2016 ke anusaar, waste ko teen streams mein segregate karna mandatory hai: biodegradable (wet), non-biodegradable (dry) aur domestic hazardous waste.

questions.question: Upcycling ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Waste materials ko use karke naye products banana jo unke original se better quality ya value ke hon

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein waste materials ko creative tarike se transform karke aise products banaye jaate hain जिनकी value original waste se zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Waste exchange platforms ka kya role hai?

options.B: Industries ke waste ko dusri industries ke liye raw material banana

questions.explanation: Waste exchange platforms ek industry ke waste ko dusri industry ke liye valuable resource ya raw material ke roop mein promote karte hain, jisse waste reduction hota hai.

questions.question: Kon sa material 'closed-loop recycling' ka achha example hai?

options.A: Plastic bags ko roads mein use karna
options.B: Old glass bottles ko melt karke naye glass bottles banana
options.C: Paper ko composting ke liye use karna
options.D: Food waste ko biogas mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Closed-loop recycling mein ek product ko recycle karke wapas wahi product banaya jata hai, jaise glass bottles se naye glass bottles.

questions.question: E-waste (Management) Rules, 2016 ka main focus kya hai?

options.B: EPR ke through e-waste ka scientific collection aur disposal

questions.explanation: E-waste Rules 2016 ka mukhya focus Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) par hai, jismein manufacturers ko apne electronic products ke end-of-life management ki zimmedari di jaati hai.

questions.question: Circular Economy concept mein waste ka kya status hai?

options.B: Waste ko ek valuable resource mana jata hai
options.D: Waste ko energy mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Circular Economy mein products, components aur materials ko unki highest utility aur value par rakhne ka prayas kiya jata hai, jismein waste ko ek valuable resource mana jata hai.

questions.question: Plastic Waste Management Rules, 2016 ka kya aim hai?

options.A: Sirf plastic bags ka use badhana
options.B: Plastic waste ko minimize karna, segregated collection aur processing ko promote karna
options.D: Plastic ko land mein bury karna

questions.explanation: Plastic Waste Management Rules ka uddeshya plastic waste generation ko kam karna, uska segregated collection, processing aur disposal ensure karna hai.

questions.question: Green procurement (ya sustainable procurement) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Products aur services kharidna jinka environmental impact kam ho

questions.explanation: Green procurement mein aise products aur services kharide jaate hain jinka environmental footprint kam ho, jaise recycled content wale products ya energy-efficient appliances.

questions.question: Product design mein 'design for disassembly' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Product ko ek baar use karke fek dena
options.B: Product ko easily disassemble karke uske components ko repair ya recycle karna

questions.explanation: Design for disassembly ka matlab hai products ko is tarah design karna ki unke components ko easily alag kiya ja sake, jisse unhe repair, reuse ya recycle karna possible ho.

questions.question: SWM workers ke liye sabse common health hazard kya hai?

options.B: Cuts, infections, respiratory diseases

questions.explanation: Waste handling ke dauran sharp objects se cuts, infectious waste se diseases aur dust/gases se respiratory issues common health hazards hain.

questions.question: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) kyon zaroori hai SWM workers ke liye?

options.B: Injuries aur infections se bachne ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye
options.D: Zyada waste collect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE jaise gloves, masks, safety shoes workers ko physical injuries aur biological/chemical hazards se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Improper waste disposal se kya environmental impact ho sakta hai?

options.B: Biodiversity mein increase

questions.explanation: Galat tareeke se waste dispose karne se hawa, paani aur mitti mein toxins aur pollutants ghul jaate hain, jo environment ko nuksan pahunchate hain.

questions.question: Landfill se nikalne wali 'leachate' ka kya effect hota hai agar use treat na kiya jaye?

options.B: Groundwater aur surface water ko contaminate karta hai

questions.explanation: Untreated leachate mein harmful chemicals hote hain jo groundwater aur surface water sources ko contaminate kar sakte hain, jisse drinking water unsafe ho jata hai.

questions.question: SWM mein community participation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waste segregation, reduction aur awareness mein logon ki involvement badhana
options.C: Community ko waste generate karne ke liye encourage karna

questions.explanation: Community participation SWM ki success ke liye critical hai, especially source segregation, proper disposal habits aur overall awareness badhane mein.

questions.question: Waste management sites par fire hazards kyon hote hain?

options.B: Methane gas, flammable materials aur spontaneous combustion ke karan

questions.explanation: Landfills mein organic waste ke decomposition se methane gas banti hai, jo highly flammable hoti hai. Saath hi, dry waste aur spontaneous combustion bhi aag lagne ka karan bante hain.

questions.question: SWM workers ko 'sharps' (jaise broken glass, needles) handle karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Puncture-resistant gloves aur proper containers ka use karna
options.C: Unhe normal waste mein mix karna

questions.explanation: Sharps se injuries aur infections ka high risk hota hai, isliye puncture-resistant gloves aur special puncture-proof containers ka use karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: SWM mein 'odor pollution' ka kya source hai?

options.B: Decomposing organic waste

questions.explanation: Organic waste ke decomposition se hydrogen sulfide aur ammonia jaise gases nikalti hain, jo badbu ka mukhya karan hoti hain.

questions.question: Vector-borne diseases (jaise dengue, malaria) waste management se kaise relate karti hain?

options.A: Waste ka koi connection nahi hai
options.B: Improper waste accumulation se machhar aur chuhe jaise vectors badhte hain
options.C: Waste se sirf air pollution hota hai

questions.explanation: Improper waste management, especially water-logging in discarded items, machharon aur rodents ke breeding grounds banata hai, jisse vector-borne diseases ka risk badhta hai.

questions.question: SWM mein Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) training kyon important hai?

options.B: Workers ko safe working practices aur hazards ke baare mein educate karne ke liye
options.D: Unhe zyada kaam dene ke liye

questions.explanation: OHS training workers ko potential hazards, unse bachne ke tarike aur emergency procedures ke baare mein jaankari deti hai, jisse accidents kam hote hain.

questions.question: SWM mein public awareness campaigns ka kya impact hota hai?

options.A: Log waste ko ignore karte hain
options.B: Source segregation, waste reduction aur proper disposal habits ko improve karta hai
options.D: Sirf government ki zimmedari badhata hai

questions.explanation: Public awareness campaigns logon ko SWM ke importance aur sahi practices ke baare mein educate karte hain, jisse overall SWM system ki efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: SWM mein 'noise pollution' ke kya sources hain?

options.B: Waste collection vehicles, processing machinery aur transfer station activities

questions.explanation: Waste collection trucks, compactors, shredders aur sorting machinery se nikalne wala shor noise pollution ka ek major source hai, especially residential areas ke paas.

questions.question: SWM mein environmental monitoring ka kya role hai?

options.B: Air, water aur soil ki quality ko regularly check karna taaki pollution control ho sake

questions.explanation: Environmental monitoring se SWM facilities ke aas-paas air, water aur soil mein pollution levels ko track kiya jata hai, jisse corrective actions liye ja sakein.

questions.question: Child labor ka waste picking mein kya impact hai?

options.B: Children ki education, health aur overall development par negative impact

questions.explanation: Child labor waste picking mein children ko dangerous conditions mein kaam karne par majboor karta hai, jisse unki health, education aur future adversely affected hota hai.

questions.question: SWM mein 'social equity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ameer logon ko waste management services dena
options.B: Sabhi communities ko fair aur equitable waste management services provide karna

questions.explanation: Social equity ka matlab hai ki waste management services aur facilities sabhi logon tak, regardless of their socio-economic status, fair aur accessible hon.

questions.question: SWM mein 'Informal Sector' (jaise rag pickers) ka kya contribution hai?

options.A: Waste ko aur zyada failate hain
options.B: Recyclable materials ki recovery mein significant role play karte hain

questions.explanation: Informal sector, especially rag pickers, India mein recyclable materials ko collect aur sort karke recycling chain mein ek bahut important role play karte hain.
